headline: Venmo Stash Rewards Expansion Tests PayPal’s Branded Payments Recovery Narrative
summary: Venmo, owned by PayPal Holdings, expanded its Stash rewards program, offering up to 5% cash back at a wider set of retailers. The program now spans major lifestyle and food brands, including Sephora, Ulta, Taco Bell, and Pizza Hut. The move aims to increase adoption of Venmo branded payments at checkout across more everyday spending categories. For PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL), Venmo's Stash expansion lands at a time when the share price sits around $49.81 and recent returns have been...

headline: How The Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets
summary: Ulta Beauty's fair value estimate has been trimmed by about US$10.88, moving from US$684.38 to US$673.50, as updated model inputs feed through to the price target. That reset comes as research firms are split between confidence in Ulta's longer term earnings story and concern about near term execution and valuation risk. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and opinions can shape your own view on Ulta's evolving narrative. Stay updated as the Fair Value for Ulta Beauty...
